text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer... My heart feels like it's about to
burst!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to run... I've n-never felt like this
before!
choice_data_list: Sounds like you're ready to give it your all.
Sounds like you're ready to give it your all.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-okay... I'll give it my all!
